Bounty Advanced Paper Towels, 2-Ply, 103 Sheets, 12-count

Item 1919326
Skip Images
2-Day Delivery
$
27.39
$5.60 OFF 
was 
$32.99
 

$4.09/per 100 sq ft

  • $5.60 OFF

    $5.60 manufacturer's savings is valid 6/15/26 through 7/19/26. While supplies last.

    Limit 2 per member.

Online Price

How To Get It

Available
Not Sold In This Warehouse
2-Day Delivery:
$3.00
2 Business Day Delivery when ordered by 12pm noon local time. No separate delivery fee with 2-Day orders of $75 or more. Item may be available in your local warehouse, prices may vary. Delivery times may be extended due to factors including order size and events outside of our control (i.e. weather/natural disasters). We do not guarantee two-day delivery.
Quantity 1
  • Select-A-Size Sheets
  • 2-Ply, 11" x 7.1" Sheets Size
  • 103 Sheets per Roll
  • 12 Individually Wrapped Rolls
  • 669 Total sq ft
View Product Details

Bounty Advanced Paper Towels have the Most Strength & Absorbency* and longer sheets**. Each sheet has a Durable Diamond Texture to tackle anything from everyday spills to tough projects throughout your home. Bounty Advanced Towels are also 2x more absorbent, so you can clean up messes quicker and use less than the leading ordinary brand. Never want to run out of Bounty? Buy in Bulk so Bounty is always on hand! You can also change it up with our printed designs.

  • Pack contains 12 Rolls of Bounty Advanced white Select-A-Size Paper Towels
  • The Most Strength & Absorbency when wet vs. customizable national competitive brand
  • Longer Sheets vs. national market select-a-size sheets
  • Select-A-Size sheets help you customize how much to use for each task
  • More absorbent so you can use less vs. leading ordinary brand

*when wet vs. customizable national competitive brand
**vs. national market select-a-size sheets


BrandBounty
Container TypeRoll
Ply2 Ply
Quantity12 Roll(s)

Two day transit is included in the quoted price.

The delivery time is 2 business days from the day of order if ordered before 12:00 noon local time.
 



Depending on your order size, orders may be shipped using an alternative shipping method, which may add a day or more to the delivery window. Delivery times may be extended due to factors including order size and events outside of our control (i.e. weather/natural disasters). We do not guarantee two-day delivery. 


Delivery is not available to Hawaii or Puerto Rico.

Costco.com products can be returned to any of our more than 800 Costco warehouses worldwide.
